title: Verity 16x
description: A Collab Between PixelPacks and ItsFlare On A Clean & Simple Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP pack!
body:
## 🎉 What is it?  
Introducing the **Verity 16x Texture Pack** – the ultimate choice for Minecraft PvP! Perfect for Bedwars, fireball fights, and all your intense PvP combat needs!

## 🌟 Features:  
- **Sleek Swords:** Swords have been adjusted for a cleaner, clearer view of the action, ensuring better focus during battles.  
- **Custom Sky & Hotbar:** Enjoy a unique sky and a fully customized hotbar for a fresh, personalized experience.  
- **Wide Compatibility:** Works seamlessly with Minecraft versions 1.6.1 to 1.20.2, with 1.8.9 being highly recommended for optimal performance.  
- **Shader Friendly:** Compatible with both **Sodium** and **Optifine**, as well as shaders that don’t alter textures.  
- **PvP Optimized:** Specifically designed for **Hypixel Bedwars** and PvP combat to give you an edge in competitive play.  
- **Resource Efficient:** Lightweight and easy on system resources, making it perfect for smoother gameplay.

## ❓ FAQs:  
### Can I use shaders with this pack?  
- Yes! As long as the shader doesn’t modify in-game textures, you’re good to go.

### Can I feature this pack in my videos or streams?  
- Absolutely! Feel free to showcase the pack—just be sure to credit both the pack and its creator.

## 🖌️ Credits:  
- [**ItsFlare**](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsFlxre) for Item creation, design, and Idea.  
- [**PixelPacks**](https://www.youtube.com/@PixelPacks) for Block creation and texture assistance.  
- **Tory** for the fireball texture.
- [**MaybeIzen**](https://www.modrinth.com/user/MaybeIzen) for gallery photos
